title: ostrya carpinifolia var. genuina
intro: Ostrya carpinifolia var. genuina, also known as the Caucasian hop hornbeam or white hop hornbeam, is a plant species in the family Betulaceae. It is native to the Caucasus region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditional herbal preparations of Ostrya carpinifolia var. genuina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
